title: Smart QR landing page with product overview, feature highlights, contact form, and embedded Login/Register app

requirements.text: Create a single-page Smart QR marketing landing page that includes: (1) a product overview section, (2) a feature highlights section, (3) a contact form, and (4) an embedded view of the existing Smart QR Login/Register app.

quotes: product overview, feature highlights, contact form,  amd embed of the Smart QR Login / Register app

acceptanceCriteria: Landing page renders as the primary app route and is usable on desktop and mobile.
Page contains clearly labeled sections for Product Overview, Feature Highlights, Contact, and an embedded Login/Register area.
All user-facing text is in English.
Embed loads inside the page via a configurable URL (e.g., environment/config value) so it can be pointed at the existing Smart QR Login/Register deployment without code changes.

requirements.text: Implement the contact form UX (name, email, message) with client-side validation and submission state handling (loading, success, error).

quotes: product overview, feature highlights, contact form,  amd embed of the Smart QR Login / Register app

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields: Name, Email, Message; all required; Email must be valid format.
On submit, the form shows a loading state and prevents duplicate submissions.
On success, show a clear confirmation message and reset the form.
On failure, show a clear error message without losing the user’s typed inputs (except as appropriate).

requirements.text: Add backend support to receive and persist contact form submissions in the single Motoko canister, and expose a query method to list submissions for basic verification/testing.

quotes: product overview, feature highlights, contact form,  amd embed of the Smart QR Login / Register app

acceptanceCriteria: Backend provides an update method to create a contact submission with: name, email, message, and server timestamp.
Submissions are persisted in stable storage so they survive canister upgrades.
Backend provides a query method to return recent submissions (suitable for verifying that submissions are stored).

requirements.text: Wire the contact form submission to the backend using the existing actor/React Query patterns in the template without modifying immutable hook files.

quotes: product overview, feature highlights, contact form,  amd embed of the Smart QR Login / Register app

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the contact form calls the Motoko backend method and stores the submission.
Frontend uses React Query mutation patterns for submission and invalidation/refetch where appropriate.

No changes are made to files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(.tsx), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui source files (compose them only).

requirements.text: Apply a coherent visual theme to the landing page (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) and use it consistently across all sections; avoid a blue/purple primary palette.

quotes: i need a landing page please

acceptanceCriteria: Landing page uses a consistent design system (type scale, spacing, button/input styles) across all sections.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; use a distinct alternative (e.g., charcoal + emerald + warm neutrals) consistently.
Design is responsive and visually polished (no overlapping elements, readable contrast, consistent alignment).

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (all logic in backend/main.mo).

Do not edit immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, and source files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose only).
No third-party email/SMS integrations (contact submissions must be handled within the app/canister).
nonGoals: Do not rebuild the Smart QR app itself (QR generation/scanning/history) beyond embedding the existing Login/Register app.
Do not implement third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
Do not implement outbound email sending for contact form submissions.

preferencesToAdd: User-facing text should be in English.
